title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped path to $10M ARR with no external funding. The interview covers growth milestones including hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, churn reduction strategies, pricing experiments, SEO/AEO tactics, and decision frameworks for solo vs co-founder models and fundraising timing.
